changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Add Packaging page (Page 9) to the Virology notebook template
changeSet.sql: -- Insert Packaging page into the template INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, title, instructions, content, page_order, completed, page_type, notebook_id, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), 'Packaging', 'Log final product packaging specifications. Record batch ID, vial type (glass vial 2mL/5mL/10mL, plastic vial, ampoule), fill volume, labeling information (product name, batch number, expiry date, storage instructions, warnings), packaging date, expiry date, and storage conditions for regulatory compliance and traceability.', 'Packaging - Final product packaging and labeling', 9, false, 'BULK_DATA_ENTRY', n.id, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 9 );

rollback.sql: -- Remove Packaging page from template DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE title = 'Packaging' AND page_order = 9 AND notebook_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true );

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Add Packaging page (Page 9) to existing Virology notebook instances that don't have it
changeSet.sql: -- Insert Packaging page for each Virology notebook instance that doesn't have page 9 INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, title, instructions, content, page_order, completed, page_type, notebook_id, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), 'Packaging', 'Log final product packaging specifications. Record batch ID, vial type (glass vial 2mL/5mL/10mL, plastic vial, ampoule), fill volume, labeling information (product name, batch number, expiry date, storage instructions, warnings), packaging date, expiry date, and storage conditions for regulatory compliance and traceability.', 'Packaging - Final product packaging and labeling', 9, false, 'BULK_DATA_ENTRY', n.id, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title LIKE '%Virology%' AND n.is_template = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 9 );

rollback.sql: -- Remove Packaging pages added by this changeset DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE title = 'Packaging' AND page_order = 9 AND notebook_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Virology%' AND is_template = false );
